further_reading.title: NIST AI RMF Playbook
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides concrete risk-management and oversight practices teams can adapt when adding human review to AI workflows.

further_reading.title: OECD AI Principle 1.2: Human-Centred Values and Fairness
further_reading.why_relevant: Directly covers human agency and oversight as safeguards for trustworthy AI use.

further_reading.title: OECD AI Principle 1.5: Accountability
further_reading.why_relevant: Explains why traceability, role clarity, and accountability remain human responsibilities in AI systems.

notes: No inline-citation seed entries were identified. The module is primarily pedagogical and normative, with no discrete statistics, incidents, vendor/version claims, standards references by name in the body, or other factual assertions that require inline sourcing under the stated rules.
